title: Assertion `pExpr->pAggInfo==pAggInfo' failed.
poc: CREATE INDEX v2 ON v0 ( v1 , v1 ) ;
ALTER TABLE zipfile RENAME TO x ;

WITH v2 AS ( SELECT v1 FROM v0 WHERE 0 ) SELECT ( SELECT v1 FROM v2 UNION ALL SELECT rank () OVER( PARTITION BY ( SELECT max ( ( SELECT count () FROM v0 JOIN v2 AS b ON v2 . v1 = v0 . v1 ) ) FROM v2 GROUP BY v1 HAVING v1 < 'MED PKG' ) ORDER BY ( SELECT v1 FROM v2 NATURAL JOIN v2 WHERE v1 = v1 AND v1 > 3 GROUP BY v1 ) ) FROM v2 ORDER BY v1 ASC , v1 ASC LIMIT 2 ) FROM v2 WHERE v1 IN ( 10 , NULL ) ;
key_bug_features: Assertion failure during complex query with aggregate functions
bug_feature_seed: CREATE TABLE t0(a INTEGER, b TEXT);
CREATE INDEX idx_t0_ab ON t0(a, a);

WITH cte AS (SELECT a FROM t0 WHERE 0) SELECT (SELECT a FROM cte UNION ALL SELECT rank() OVER (PARTITION BY (SELECT max(count(*) ) FROM t0 GROUP BY a) ORDER BY (SELECT a FROM cte)) FROM cte LIMIT 2) FROM cte WHERE a IN (10, NULL);
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value REAL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Sample A', 10.5), ('Sample B', NULL), ('Sample C', 20.0);
WITH ranked_values AS (SELECT id, name, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY value) as rank FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) SELECT * FROM ranked_values WHERE rank <= 2;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value > (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) OR name IS NULL;
